message:
feat(schema): add capability manifest v2 with intents, provenance, and hostcall classes

Extend extension_manifest.json to accept both pi.ext.cap.v1 and
pi.ext.cap.v2 via oneOf discriminator, enabling forward-compatible
manifest evolution while maintaining backward compatibility:

v2 additions:
- intents: required array of behavioral intent classes (file_read,
  file_write, process_exec, network_egress, env_read, etc.)
- connector_classes: required array of connector families (tool, fs,
  exec, env, http, etc.)
- hostcall_classes: required array with fine-grained fs operations
  (fs.read, fs.write, fs.list, fs.stat, fs.mkdir, fs.delete)
- provenance: required object with source URL, sha256 integrity digest,
  and publisher attestation (id + verification level)
- risk_tier: optional enum (low, medium, high, critical)
- scope.allowed_tools: new scope constraint field

Schema organization:
- All v1 definition names suffixed with _v1 to avoid collisions
- v2 definitions added alongside with _v2 suffix
- Root schema uses oneOf to dispatch based on schema_version field

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
